description_long: This hammer features a robust, double-sided cylindrical head with a predominantly black finish and two white bands encircling each end. The head is mounted on a straight, black handle that is accented with white stripes, giving it a modern, high-contrast appearance. The handle appears to be smooth and uniform in thickness, suggesting a synthetic or composite material. On the striking face of the head, there is a white circular area with the letters 'IMP' in bold, stylized red and black font, possibly indicating a brand or model. The hammer's design is symmetrical, with both ends of the head identical in shape and size, making it suitable for heavy-duty striking tasks. The overall construction suggests durability and a focus on both function and visual impact.
description: A black double-sided hammer with white bands and a straight, striped handle, featuring 'IMP' branding on the head.
description_view_0: Side view showing the symmetrical, double-sided cylindrical head and the straight handle with white stripes.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular striking face with the 'IMP' logo and the full length of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, identical to view 0, displaying the double-sided head and handle details.
description_view_3: Rear view mirroring view 1, showing the 'IMP' logo on the opposite striking face.
attribute_handle_type: Straight plastic handle with black coloration and white horizontal stripes, smooth surface, no visible ergonomic grip enhancements.
attribute_head_type: Double-sided cylindrical sledge-type head, both ends flat and identical, designed for heavy striking.
attribute_brand_or_logo: IMP logo visible on both striking faces.
